_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze design constraints, analyze trade-offs and detailed system and security design, and consider lifecycle support.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-002 (DA, cosine: 0.472), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.452).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.543). Shared vocabulary: [design]. DCWF-only terms [analyze, consider, constraints, detailed, lifecycle, offs] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, balance, delivery, immediate, implementations, long] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.867, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (92.4%). "Analyze design constraints, analyze trade-offs and detailed system and security" and "Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requ" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.474 < STS 0.543 (gap -0.068). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analyze, consider, constraints] and [ability, balance, delivery] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [design]. DCWF-only: [analyze, consider, constraints, detailed, lifecycle, offs]. WIDAI-only: [ability, balance, delivery, immediate, implementations, long].
